description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The ID of the CVE, for example: CVE-2015-1653 CVE.CVSS The CVSS of the CVE, for example: 10.0
outputs.name: CVE.ID

outputs.description: Date The timestamp of when the CVE was published. CVE.Modified
outputs.name: CVE.Published

outputs.description: The timestamp of when the CVE was last modified. CVE.Description A description of the CVE.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The ID of the CVE Qintel.CVE.AffectedSystem Systems affected by the CVE
outputs.name: Qintel.CVE.ID

outputs.description: Systems affected by the CVE Qintel.CVE.LastObserved Last threat actor observation time
outputs.name: Qintel.CVE.AffectedVersions

outputs.description: List of observations DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: Qintel.CVE.Observations

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
